sections.paragraph:
to patch, sew up. (Chald. טְלָא id.) Jos 9:5, נְעָלֹות מְטֻלָּאֹות “patched up shoes.” [But this belongs to Pual.]

[Kal, pass.] Part. טָלוּא spotted, having large spots like patches on a garment (comp. Germ. Fleck, which signifies both a spot and a patch, i.q. Flicke, whence flicken). Gen 30:33, seq.; Eze 16:16.

[Pual part. Jos 9:5 see above.]
